overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of an armored character walking through a snowy mountain pass at dusk with a crimson sky. The character approaches a distant stone fortress while a bright magical flash briefly illuminates the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain ravine between rocky cliffs

events.description: bright white magical flash briefly illuminates the path ahead

agents.ego_description: armored character with shield walking steadily through the narrow snowy passage

entered.detail: tall dark rock formation forming the left wall of the ravine
tall dark rock formation forming the right wall of the ravine
snowy path with footprints where the character walks
stone fortress or watchtower visible on the horizon against the red sky

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow snowy ravine flanked by tall rocky cliffs. The path is covered in snow and leads toward a distant stone tower visible against the crimson dusk sky. A sudden bright flash of light illuminates the area around the 4-second mark before fading back to darkness.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snowy valley approaching stone fortress

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk toward the fortress structure while the valley widens

entered.detail: wooden scaffolding and defensive structures at the base of the tower

segments.scene_description: As the ravine opens into a wider valley, the stone fortress becomes more prominent and detailed. Wooden scaffolding and fortifications become visible at the tower's base. The rocky cliff walls recede to the sides as the character continues the approach across the snow-covered terrain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow, snowy ravine that gradually opens into a wide valley dominated by a stone fortress. It begins with the character walking between tall rocky cliffs under a crimson dusk sky, heading toward a distant tower. As the journey progresses, a sudden bright flash of light momentarily illuminates the snowy path before fading back into the dim evening light. The scene then expands as the cliff walls recede, revealing the fortress in greater detail with wooden scaffolding and fortifications becoming visible at the tower's base. Finally, the camera continues its steady approach across the open, snow-covered terrain toward the imposing structure.
